emout
  • emout
  • View page source

emout

EMSES simulation output analysis & visualization library

Lang: English | 日本語

emout

Python library for analyzing and visualizing EMSES simulation outputs

  • Documentation: https://nkzono99.github.io/emout/

  • Notebook example: Visualization of lunar surface charging simulation

emout reads EMSES output files (.h5) and parameter files (plasma.inp / plasma.toml), letting you browse, plot, animate, and convert data to SI units in just a few lines of code.
